Do not iron on print and studsDesigned for that comfortable-yet-stylish look for your little princess, this girly pink top from disney is a must-have for your girl's wardrobe. The cotton fabric will keep your little girl well ventilated and dry, while the puffed sleeves add a feminine touch to it. Pair it with denim shorts or skirts and pretty footwear from the crocs collection available at myntra, include colourful jibbitz, and transform your little darling into a princess.
